claims.subject: OpenAI
claims.object: GPT‑5.6 series limited preview (Sol, Terra, Luna)

claims.subject: OpenAI
claims.object: GPT‑5.6 token pricing (Sol: $5/$30; Terra: $2.50/$15; Luna: $1/$6) and cache billing (1.25x writes, 90% discount reads)

claims.subject: OpenAI
claims.object: GPT‑5.6 general availability planned in coming weeks

evidence.quote: We're beginning a limited preview of the GPT‑5.6 series: Sol, our flagship model; Terra, a balanced model for everyday work; and Luna, a fast and affordable model.

GPT‑5.6 is priced per 1M tokens across three model sizes: Sol is $5 input / $30 output; Terra is $2.50 input / $15 output; and Luna is $1 input / $6 output. GPT‑5.6 also introduces more predictable prompt caching, including support for explicit cache breakpoints and a 30-minute minimum cache life. For GPT‑5.6 and later models, cache writes are billed at 1.25x the model’s uncached input rate, while cache reads continue to receive the 90% cached-input discount.
We believe in broad access, and we plan to make GPT‑5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna generally available in the coming weeks.
